task_command: cd speed_test/cuda_ops && mkdir -p build && cd build && rm -rf * && cmake -DCUDNN_INCLUDE_DIR=/opt/conda/lib/python3.11/site-packages/nvidia/cudnn/include -DCUDNN_LIBRARIES=/opt/conda/lib/python3.11/site-packages/nvidia/cudnn/lib/libcudnn.so.9  .. && make && cd ../../ && python test_gemm.py gemm_f16.csv 16 1
start_command_hints: 映射/mnt/nvme1n1/dongkaixing到容器中，工作目录切换到/mnt/nvme1n1/dongkaixing/sglang/3rdparty/AIChipBenchmark/operators
task_command_hints: 在容器内先cd到/mnt/nvme1n1/dongkaixing/sglang/3rdparty/AIChipBenchmark/operators目录，再执行编译和测试命令。cmake构建在speed_test/cuda_ops/build目录下。
